summary: Matched a batch of previously stubbed functions in src/melee/un/un_2FC9.c and src/melee/if/ifall.c, mostly scene-transition helpers, HUD initialization/visibility drawing glue, and small wrapper/lookup routines. The PR also tightened headers by replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete bool, void, int, HSD_GObj*, and named scene-setting prototypes where the implementations made signatures clear.
what_changed: Implemented ifAll_802F3394 and ifAll_802F33CC as ordered initialization/update-style calls into ifStatus, ifTime, un_2FC9, and ifMagnify routines.

Implemented fn_802F36B8(HSD_GObj*) to render/update a camera object only when the HUD hidden flag ifAll_804D6D58 is zero, using HSD_CObjSetCurrent(GET_COBJ(gobj)), HSD_GObj_80390ED0(gobj, 0x7), and HSD_CObjEndCurrent().
Added includes needed by ifall.c for ifmagnify, ifstatus, iftime, un_2FC9, baselib/cobj, and baselib/gobj.

Implemented many un_2FC9 scene/action transition functions that take a bool update_scene parameter, gate their side effects on update_scene == true, perform audio state calls such as lbAudioAx_80024030(1), set pending/minor scenes via gm_SetScenePendingMinor or gm_801A42F8, and call gm_801A4B60().

Implemented audio reset helper un_802FFC30 and conditional scene-update helper un_802FFC6C with calls to lbAudioAx_80023694, lbAudioAx_800236DC, lbAudioAx_800245D4, lbAudioAx_800245F4, and lbAudioAx_80024614.
Implemented fn_802FFE6C(bool update_scene), which preserves the boolean result and, when update_scene is false, calls lbAudioAx_80024030(0), un_80304334(un_80302DF0()), and returns false.

Implemented unlock-related transition helpers un_80300BF8 and un_80300C3C, which call un_803124BC, set trophy unlock state with Trophy_SetUnlockState for trophy IDs 0xE6 and 0xC9, then switch scene with gm_801A42F8(1) and gm_801A4B60().
Implemented un_80304B94(int option) as a switch returning numeric IDs that mostly do not differ by language, except option 2 returns 0x11 for JP and 0x10 otherwise.
Added a small static wrapper fn_802FCAA4(HSD_GObj* gobj, int idx) that forwards to HSD_GObj_JObjCallback(gobj, idx).
Updated un_2FC9.h prototypes for matched functions from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures, mainly bool func(bool), bool func(void), and int func(int).
Renamed gm_801A428C to gm_SetSceneMinor and gm_801A42A0 to gm_SetScenePendingMinor in gm_1A36.h.
Added a real iftime.h include guard and prototypes for ifTime_802F405C and ifTime_802F40B8.
Changed lbAudioAx_800245D4 prototype from unknown to void lbAudioAx_800245D4(int).
smart_moves: Recognized a repeating scene-switching idiom: most bool update_scene handlers perform side effects only when update_scene is true, then return false. Reusing that pattern allowed many small functions in un_2FC9.c to be matched consistently.
Pulled concrete prototypes into headers alongside implementations, reducing reliance on UNK_RET and UNK_PARAMS and making call sites type-safe for later decomp work.
Introduced descriptive aliases gm_SetSceneMinor and gm_SetScenePendingMinor for two gm_1A36 scene functions, improving readability where un_2FC9 transition helpers set specific pending minors.
Kept fn_802FCAA4 static in un_2FC9.c, matching its local wrapper nature rather than exporting an unnecessary symbol.

For ifAll_802F36B8, used the baselib camera-object current/end-current pattern directly around HSD_GObj_80390ED0, preserving likely engine rendering semantics and keeping the HUD hidden guard explicit.

Used lbLang_IsSettingJP in un_80304B94 even where both branches currently return the same value, which can be necessary for matching control flow and preserving the original binary's language-conditional structure.
decomp_lessons: When many adjacent stubs share the same signature and shape, look for a table-driven or callback-like pattern: here many un_2FC9 functions are bool transition callbacks with a bool update_scene gate.
Do not simplify language checks away if the original control flow appears to branch on language; identical branch results can still be required for matching.
Scene transition helpers often pair an audio-mode call, a scene/minor setter, and gm_801A4B60. That sequence is reusable evidence for identifying similar functions.
HUD draw callbacks may need baselib camera setup/teardown calls around gobj processing; matching should preserve HSD_CObjSetCurrent and HSD_CObjEndCurrent structure.

Header progress is part of matching progress: once implementations reveal argument and return types, replace placeholder prototypes so other files can compile cleanly and future matches have better type information.
A function can legitimately return a constant bool even after doing scene side effects; many handlers here return false regardless of whether update_scene was true.
naming_conventions: gm_801A428C was renamed to gm_SetSceneMinor, using a descriptive gm_ prefix and PascalCase-style action phrase after the subsystem prefix.
gm_801A42A0 was renamed to gm_SetScenePendingMinor, clarifying that the integer argument is a pending minor scene ID.
Existing address-based un_* and ifAll_* names were retained for still-unidentified functions, while exact signatures were improved.
Internal local wrapper fn_802FCAA4 retained the address-based fn_ name and was declared static rather than promoted to a public header symbol.
ifTime functions use the ifTime_802Fxxxx subsystem prefix, and iftime.h gained matching declarations.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Preserve explicit comparisons such as update_scene == true and update_scene == false where they may affect generated code shape.
Keep repeated side-effect blocks in the same call order: audio calls first, then scene minor/scene setter, then gm_801A4B60 for transition execution.
For matching language-dependent switches, write both JP and non-JP branches even if most cases produce identical constants.
Use concrete bool return types for callback-like functions that return true or false constants instead of leaving them as UNK_RET.
Use concrete argument types from call behavior, such as HSD_GObj* for callbacks passed to HSD camera/GObj APIs and int for numeric scene/audio parameters.
Simple forwarding wrappers, such as a static function that only calls HSD_GObj_JObjCallback, can be sufficient matches and should not be overcomplicated.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR context.
The PR body states the work covers various scene switching functions and ifall code that looks like initialization.
follow_up_queries: Find other un_2FC9 bool update_scene callbacks that still use UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and compare them against the transition patterns introduced in PR1567.
Audit callers of gm_SetScenePendingMinor and gm_801A42F8 to infer names for remaining scene/minor IDs.
Search for language-dependent switch functions similar to un_80304B94 where identical JP/non-JP branches should be preserved for matching.
Look for remaining HUD or camera draw callbacks in ifall that should use HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_GObj_80390ED0, and HSD_CObjEndCurrent.
Check whether lbAudioAx_800245D4 and nearby audio functions can receive more descriptive names now that their int parameter usage is known.
